data.headline: Portfolio +0.33% vs SPY +0.30% — Outperforming Benchmark with NVDA Position
data.summary:
End-of-day portfolio equity stands at $1,003,288.73, up 0.328% from the $1,000,000.00 starting cash. The portfolio outperformed the SPY benchmark by 2.9 basis points, generating alpha of 0.000289. 

Performance driver: Concentrated long position in NVDA (374 shares at mark of $102.50). The position shows $167.93 in unrealized gains and $3,124.81 in realized gains. Holdings value is $38,335.00 with cash reserves of $964,953.73.

Activity: 8 trades executed across 8 decision points with negligible execution cost ($0.07 total).

Open risks: Single-name concentration risk in NVDA. Portfolio remains 96.2% in cash, leaving significant dry powder but also indicating limited deployed capital. No operational or risk-management rejections flagged during the session.
data.risk_note: High cash concentration (96.2%) and single-stock exposure (NVDA only). Market moves in NVDA will drive portfolio performance with limited diversification buffer.
